summary: AeroSentinel v2 testing complete. All 8 new v2 backend endpoints PASS (13/13 pytest, including Gemini text + vision calls). All 5 stakeholder routes render without console/page errors. Landing, CommandCenter, Citizen, Inspector and Copilot drawer flows verified end-to-end via Playwright. Notice dialog opens with full Gemini-generated notice text containing VIOLATION + ward name + source IDs. Image complaint flow uploads a real JPEG (smoke plume) and gets back a structured Gemini Vision analysis.

integration_issues.issue: Copy button stays on 'COPY' label after click because navigator.clipboard.writeText fails in iframe/preview ('Write permission denied'). User-facing impact is low (real browsers with focus work), but a fallback (e.g., document.execCommand or graceful toast) would make the 'Copied' state always visible.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Test request specified data-testid 'inspector-dispatch-{rec_id}' for the Mark Dispatched button, but code uses 'inspector-ack-{rec_id}'. Functionally identical; consider aligning naming convention if test specs are authoritative.

OPTIONAL: Notice copy button — wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in a try/catch and fall back to a hidden textarea + execCommand('copy'), so the 'Copied' state still appears in embedded/preview iframes that block clipboard.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1100 lines and is now beyond the 700-line guideline — recommend splitting into modules (e.g., gemini_clients.py, registry.py, routes_v2.py).

gemini_vision_analyze handles markdown fences, but the JSON parsing path silently falls back on any failure; consider logging the raw text snippet (truncated) to aid debugging when Gemini returns malformed output.

ENFORCEMENT, POLLUTERS, SENSORS, etc. are mutable module-level globals — fine for single-process demo, but in a multi-worker deployment the acknowledge() state would not be shared across workers. MongoDB hydration partially mitigates this on restart only.
seed_data_creation: 1 test complaint created in MongoDB via POST /api/complaints (CMP-* id). Inspector acknowledgement state for REC-1001/REC-1005 was toggled during the run; backend exposes POST /api/enforcement/reset to clear if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2 endpoints + UI flows verified on 2026-01. test_v2_endpoints.py is the canonical regression suite; it generates a fresh JPEG inline so no fixture files needed. PIL is already installed. Inspector's dispatch button uses data-testid 'inspector-ack-{rec_id}' (NOT inspector-dispatch). Notice copy click in headless preview will throw clipboard permission denied — that's environmental, not a bug.
